description_long: This is a rectangular serving tray with rounded corners and a slightly raised rim around the perimeter. The tray is a deep brown color and features a subtle, crosshatched texture on its main surface, likely to provide grip and prevent items from sliding. The rim is gently sloped and appears to be of moderate thickness, providing structural support and helping to contain items placed on the tray. The overall form is simple and utilitarian, with no visible handles or decorative embellishments. The material appears to be a hard plastic, commonly used for lightweight, durable trays in cafeterias or fast food settings. There are no visible logos, brand marks, or additional features on the surface.
description: A rectangular, deep brown serving tray with a raised rim and a crosshatched textured surface, made of hard plastic. The design is simple, functional, and unadorned.
description_view_0: The tray is seen from the long side, showing the full width and the gentle slope of the raised rim.
description_view_1: The tray is viewed from the short side, highlighting the depth and the uniformity of the rim around the edge.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this shows the opposite long side, again emphasizing the rectangular shape and rim.
description_view_3: This view matches view 1, displaying the short side and the consistent rim height.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is raised, moderately thick, smoothly rounded, and runs continuously around the perimeter of the tray. It is slightly sloped inward and lacks any decorative or functional features such as lips or grooves.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface appears matte with minimal reflectivity, showing no significant glare or highlights. The entire tray has a uniform, low-sheen finish.
